name: Hawaiian Sweet Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl combine 1-1/2 cups flour and yeast; set aside.
2. Drain pineapple in a sieve, pressing as much juice out as possible. Add orange juice to make 1/2 cup. Pour into a small saucepan, add sugar, salt, and butter.
3. Stir constantly over medium heat until butter softens. Add juice mixture, bananas, and egg to flour mixture. Beat 1 minute with an electric mixer on low speed.
4. Scrape down batter, beat 2 minutes longer at high speed. Stir in enough remaining flour by hand to make a soft dough. Stir in drained pineapple, cover bowl with a towel. Let rise in warm place until double, 1 to 1-1/2 hours.
5. Stir dough down, grease a 2-quart casserole dish with high sides. Turn dough into dish. Cover with towel and let rise for 45 minutes.
6. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) until brown, 30 to 40 minutes. Cool for 5 minutes. Remove from dish, top with topping.
Orange Topping:
Combine cream cheese with honey and beat with an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Stir in coconut.
